reviews.review_description: Great game, totally absorbing. Comfortable to play.
This game is awesome and should be ported to Quest 2 and 3

smash hit vr 1.5.0 coming sont 2025
Mediocre AB quand 2 & quand 3

I was stuck till 4am! 
It’s worth it to just go ahead and make that purchase!
You won’t regret it!

It has been great on the oculus Go! Fun game and not terribly difficult to where I'm just getting frustrated. Only takes about a minute to figure out how to play at first. It's one of my favorite games on the Go.

I have the Oculus Go because I can’t afford the Quest or Rift. The simple fact that this game works with the Go is outstanding. I played it on my phone and enjoyed it also. Like most other quest games, I figured it wouldn’t make the Go due to possibly processing power the Go is limited to. All in all, thanks for letting me enjoy my Oculus Go.
Super fun. I enjoy playing this game on my phone, but playing in VR is absolutely amazing. For such a cheap price this game is more than worth it.

I played it and loved it on ipad, so I thought it's a no brainer. But the head aiming may work, but it's stupid. Also, I really REALLY miss the different game modes I know. Those are the two stars off.

VR works great, there are moments where you really feel to have to duck and swerve physically, and the 3D sounds is very nice.
This game is fun, artistic, and shows off what VR capability

I have had this game on my iPhone for a year or so and it has always been my favorite, but now I have it on my Oculus Go and I will say one thing WOW!!! This is absolutely addictive. Best game by far!!!

I have only had the Oculus Go for a few days, but this has got to be one of my favourite games. Very simple but highly addictive. It’s the kind of game you keep on coming back to. Simple to learn, but provides hours of entertainment.
Have had this game in my phone library for years and it’s even better in VR. A classic 🤘🔥
Really fun game right up until the levels start rotating. Then I get motion sickness
Just perfect.
One of the best games on Oculus Go.  The spectacular 3d graphics looked so realistic that I found myself ducking my head away from the broken glass.  I love the simplicity of this game.
I used to play this on my phone and tablet when I was little, and now it’s on my freakin VR SYSTEM!!! I just fell that this game is even more fun than it used to be.

This was the first game I got, and it absolutely blew me away!!! This game is so intense and fun to be in VR!!!!!My only complainylt is the powerup system. Pls make it like mobile where you activate when you want to. I like to save them up...
A

I love the game because it’s satisfying and 
fun, I played it on mobile too but I think the VR version is better because the music is so good and EDM trance kinda style, Great game!
What a nice experience!
